title: Held — Tiny Bridge Rep #002
content_html:
You keep meaning to starting strong and fading after three days, but the moment keeps passing.

Avoidance feels like relief, but it also teaches the habit to come back stronger.

That is why 'actually follow through' needs a tiny repeatable system, not just another good intention.

Make it small enough to do before your brain talks you out of it.

One checkpoint you can actually mark done.

Then log what happened so the next rep gets easier to choose.

Held helps with one prayer partner, small daily rhythm — without turning it into another vague intention.

Comment 'rep' if you know the first step is the hardest part.
